# Copilot Instructions

## Repository Overview

This is a simple Python repository. The main entry point is `hello.py`.

## Language & Runtime

- **Language**: Python 3
- **Entry point**: `hello.py`

## Code Style

- Follow [PEP 8](https://peps.python.org/pep-0008/) style guidelines for Python code.
- Use 4 spaces for indentation (no tabs).
- Keep lines under 79 characters.
- Use descriptive variable and function names.

## Project Structure

```
./
├── .github/
│   └── copilot-instructions.md
├── hello.py        # Main Python script
└── README.md       # Project documentation
```

## Running the Code

```bash
python3 hello.py
```

## Contribution Guidelines

- Write clear, readable code with comments where necessary.
- Ensure all Python files start with the `#!/usr/bin/env python3` shebang line.
- Test any changes before submitting.
